items.title_en: Oil rises as Iran war worries keep markets on edge as Strait of Hormuz stays shut
items.title_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡保持关闭，伊朗战争担忧令市场紧张，油价上涨
items.desc_en: Oil prices rose as investors stayed cautious despite a three-week extension of the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire.
items.desc_zh: 尽管以色列和黎巴嫩停火期限延长三周，但由于投资者保持谨慎，油价上涨。

items.title_zh: 实时更新：特朗普表示，在白宫和谈后，以色列和黎巴嫩停火期限延长了三周 - 哥伦比亚广播公司新闻

items.title_zh: 美国士兵因涉嫌押注他参与的马杜罗袭击而被捕 - Axios

items.desc_zh: 美国士兵因涉嫌押注马杜罗袭击而被捕，他参加了 Axios 美国特种部队士兵因涉嫌在马杜罗袭击中赢得 40 万美元而被捕 CNN 马杜罗袭击中的士兵被指控

items.title_en: Trump news at a glance: a tale of two blockades as US and Iran spin their control over strait of Hormuz - The Guardian
items.title_zh: 特朗普新闻一览：美国和伊朗控制霍尔木兹海峡时两次封锁的故事 - 《卫报》
items.desc_en: Trump news at a glance: a tale of two blockades as US and Iran spin their control over strait of Hormuz  The GuardianLive updates: Trump threatens to shoot boats laying mines as tension escalates in S
items.desc_zh: 特朗普新闻一览：美国和伊朗对霍尔木兹海峡的控制权发生两次封锁的故事卫报直播更新：随着美国紧张局势升级，特朗普威胁要射击埋设水雷的船只

items.title_en: US soldier charged after winning $400,000 betting on removal of Maduro
items.title_zh: 美国士兵因押注推翻马杜罗赢得40万美元而被指控
items.desc_en: Gannon Ken Van Dyke allegedly made trades on Polymarket on the basis of classified information, the justice department says.
items.desc_zh: 司法部称，甘农·肯·范·戴克 (Gannon Ken Van Dyke) 涉嫌根据机密信息在 Polymarket 进行交易。

items.title_en: Japan core inflation accelerates after five months as Iran war stokes energy worries
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争引发能源担忧，日本核心通胀五个月后加速
items.desc_en: Government data showed the inflation figure — which strips out prices of fresh food — was in line with the 1.8% expected by economists polled by Reuters.
items.desc_zh: 政府数据显示，剔除新鲜食品价格后的通胀数据与路透社调查的经济学家预期的 1.8% 一致。

items.title_en: From scientist to silk farmer: India's silk industry renewal
items.title_zh: 从科学家到丝农：印度丝绸业的复兴
items.desc_en: Silk production is an increasingly high-tech business in India.
items.desc_zh: 在印度，丝绸生产是一个日益高科技的行业。

items.title_en: White House memo claims mass AI theft by Chinese firms
items.title_zh: 白宫备忘录称中国公司大规模盗窃人工智能
items.desc_en: A memo from Michael Kratsios says firms, mainly in China, are wrongfully distilling US AI models.
items.desc_zh: Michael Kratsios 的一份备忘录称，主要是中国的公司错误地借鉴了美国的人工智能模型。

items.title_en: U.S. soldier arrested for $400K winning Polymarket bets on Maduro capture, DOJ says
items.title_zh: 美国司法部称，一名美国士兵因在 Polymarket 赌注马杜罗被捕而赢得 40 万美元而被捕
items.desc_en: The arrest comes as concerns have grown about people with inside information making bets on the Polymarket and Kalshi prediction markets.
items.desc_zh: 此次逮捕之际，人们越来越担心掌握内幕信息的人在 Polymarket 和 Kalshi 预测市场上下注。

items.title_en: Spirit Airlines lawyer says cash 'not going to last for very much longer,' but government rescue on the table
items.title_zh: 精神航空律师表示，现金“不会持续太久”，但政府救援已摆在桌面上
items.desc_en: Spirit Airlines confirmed it is in talks with the Trump administration for a rescue package.
items.desc_zh: 精神航空证实正在与特朗普政府就救援方案进行谈判。

items.title_en: Singer D4vd had 'significant amount' of child sex abuse images when arrested, prosecutors say
items.title_zh: 检察官称歌手 D4vd 在被捕时拥有“大量”儿童性虐待图像
items.desc_en: The Tiktok star's attorneys have maintained his innocence and vowed to "vigorously defend" him.
items.desc_zh: 这位抖音明星的律师坚称他无罪，并誓言“大力捍卫”他。

items.title_zh: 特朗普海军部长因造船纠纷被免职 - 英国《卫报》

items.title_en: Meta to lay off 8,000 as part of AI efficiency push - Axios
items.title_zh: Meta 将裁员 8,000 人，作为推动 AI 效率提升的一部分 - Axios
items.desc_en: Meta to lay off 8,000 as part of AI efficiency push  AxiosMeta to cut 10% of staff as it pours billions into AI  CNNBehind Meta’s Huge Layoffs Is a Relentless Shift Toward AI  WSJMeta to cut 8,000 job
items.desc_zh: Meta 将裁员 8,000 人，作为人工智能效率的一部分，推动 AxiosMeta 裁员 10%，因为它向 AI 投入了数十亿美元 CNN Meta 大规模裁员的背后是向 AI 的不懈转变 WSJMeta 将裁员 8,000 人

items.title_en: Trump says Israel-Lebanon ceasefire extended by three weeks
items.title_zh: 特朗普称以色列与黎巴嫩停火期限延长三周
items.desc_en: Israel and Lebanon agreed to extend their ceasefire by three weeks following a meeting in the White House with top U.S. officials, President Donald Trump said.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统表示，在白宫与美国高级官员举行会议后，以色列和黎巴嫩同意将停火期限延长三周。

items.desc_zh: 肯·格里芬 (Ken Griffin) 的 Citadel 攻击佐兰·马姆达尼 (Zohran Mamdani) 利用他的顶层公寓出售纽约税收计划肯·格里芬 (Ken Griffin) 在 Mamdani 打造价值 2.38 亿美元的顶层公寓后予以反击

items.title_en: White House exasperated with GOP over Virginia election faceplant - Politico
items.title_zh: 白宫对共和党在弗吉尼亚州选举中的面子感到愤怒 - Politico
items.desc_en: White House exasperated with GOP over Virginia election faceplant  PoliticoJudge bars certification of Virginia redistricting results; state AG promises appeal  CNNCourt pauses redistricting in Virgin
items.desc_zh: 白宫对共和党对弗吉尼亚州选举面貌感到愤怒，PoliticoJudge 禁止对弗吉尼亚州重新划分选区的结果进行认证；州 AG 承诺上诉 CNN 法院暂停维珍郡重新划分选区

items.title_en: US boards ship carrying Iran oil as Trump threatens mine-laying vessels
items.title_zh: 特朗普威胁布雷船，美国登上运载伊朗石油的船只
items.desc_en: Central Command said it has intercepted 33 vessels since imposing a blockade on ships coming to and from Iran.
items.desc_zh: 中央司令部表示，自对进出伊朗的船只实施封锁以来，已拦截了 33 艘船只。

items.title_en: US government watchdog to investigate Epstein files release
items.title_zh: 美国政府监管机构调查爱泼斯坦文件发布
items.desc_en: The justice department's inspector general will review the withholding and overdue release of secret files.
items.desc_zh: 司法部监察长将审查扣留和逾期披露秘密文件的情况。

items.title_en: Nike cuts 1,400 roles in second round of layoffs this year
items.title_zh: 耐克今年第二轮裁员 1400 人
items.desc_en: Nike announced 1,400 layoffs, primarily in its technology department, on Thursday after previously cutting 775 jobs in January.
items.desc_zh: 继 1 月份裁员 775 人之后，耐克于周四宣布裁员 1,400 人，主要是在技术部门。

items.title_en: Intel's stock soars 15% as results top estimates, with chipmaker showing signs of growth
items.title_zh: 业绩超预期 英特尔股价大涨15% 芯片制造商显现增长迹象
items.desc_en: Intel has been a Wall Street darling of late even as the business has yet to find much momentum.
items.desc_zh: 英特尔最近一直是华尔街的宠儿，尽管该业务尚未找到太大动力。

items.title_en: These stocks reporting next week can beat expectations and rally, Bespoke says
items.title_zh: Bespoke表示，下周公布的这些股票可能会超出预期并出现反弹
items.desc_en: CNBC Pro screened for stocks releasing quarterly financials next week that beat expectations for earnings per share at least 75% of the time.
items.desc_zh: CNBC Pro 筛选了下周发布季度财务报告的股票，其中每股收益至少有 75% 超出预期。

items.title_en: Regeneron inks drug pricing deal with Trump, will offer new hearing-loss therapy for free
items.title_zh: 再生元与特朗普签署药品定价协议，将免费提供新的听力损失疗法
items.desc_en: Regeneron is the latest in a string of major drugmakers to make pricing concessions for new and existing medicines under agreements with Trump.
items.desc_zh: 再生元是一系列主要制药商中最新一家根据与特朗普达成的协议对新药和现有药物做出价格让步的公司。

items.title_en: Meta says it will cut 8,000 jobs as AI spending grows
items.title_zh: Meta 表示，随着人工智能支出的增长，它将裁员 8,000 人
items.desc_en: The cuts, which employees had been expecting for weeks, will be Meta's largest layoff since 2023.
items.desc_zh: 此次裁员是员工数周以来一直期待的，这将是 Meta 自 2023 年以来最大规模的裁员。

items.title_en: Meta will cut 10% of workforce as company pushes deeper into AI
items.title_zh: 随着公司深入人工智能领域，Meta 将裁员 10%
items.desc_en: Meta plans to lay off 10% of its workforce, equaling about 8,000 employees, as the company continues to ramp up investments in artificial intelligence.
items.desc_zh: 随着公司继续加大对人工智能的投资，Meta 计划裁员 10%，相当于约 8,000 名员工。

items.title_en: Owning the stage: Look past Live Nation's legal troubles to see a growing, high-margin venue business
items.title_zh: 拥有舞台：回顾 Live Nation 的法律麻烦，看到不断增长的高利润场馆业务
items.desc_en: Live Nation's stock hasn't caught up to the possibility that the company, once freed from its legal overhang, can capture more fan dollars.
items.desc_zh: Live Nation 的股价还没有赶上该公司一旦摆脱法律困境就能获得更多粉丝收入的可能性。

items.title_en: Inside the daring 3-hour operation to rescue a group of tourists from a cliff in Australia - CBS News
items.title_zh: 在澳大利亚历时 3 小时从悬崖上营救一群游客的大胆行动中 - 哥伦比亚广播公司 (CBS) 新闻
items.desc_en: Inside the daring 3-hour operation to rescue a group of tourists from a cliff in Australia  CBS NewsFirst responder speaks out after family of 7 rescued from cliff  YahooFamily of seven clinging to cl
items.desc_zh: 在澳大利亚，从悬崖上营救一群游客的大胆行动历时 3 小时，第一反应者在 7 口之家从悬崖上获救后发声

items.title_en: Woman killed by bear in Polish forest, son and local government say
items.title_zh: 儿子和当地政府称，一名妇女在波兰森林中被熊杀死
items.desc_en: In an extremely rare fatal encounter, the 58-year-old was killed as she was walking in a mountainous area, her son told rescuers.
items.desc_zh: 她的儿子告诉救援人员，在一次极其罕见的致命遭遇中，这位 58 岁的妇女在山区行走时身亡。

items.title_en: Masked Iranian forces appear to seize ships in staged video
items.title_zh: 蒙面伊朗军队在视频中似乎扣押了船只
items.desc_en: Analysis indicates that parts of the video appear to have been filmed hours after the ships were reportedly seized.
items.desc_zh: 分析表明，视频的部分内容似乎是在据报道船只被扣押数小时后拍摄的。

items.title_en: Huge chunk of glacier blocks Everest route in peak climbing season
items.title_zh: 攀登高峰季节，巨大的冰川阻挡了珠穆朗玛峰的路线
items.desc_en: Sherpas cannot prepare the route to the world's highest peak because a huge block of ice is in the way.
items.desc_zh: 夏尔巴人无法准备通往世界最高峰的路线，因为路上有一块巨大的冰块。

items.title_zh: 匈牙利取消否决权后，欧盟批准了一项 106B 美元的贷款计划以帮助乌克兰 - 美联社新闻

items.title_en: UK and French governments sign a 3-year deal to curb migrant crossings in English Channel - AP News
items.title_zh: 英国和法国政府签署为期三年的协议，遏制英吉利海峡的移民过境 - 美联社新闻
items.desc_en: UK and French governments sign a 3-year deal to curb migrant crossings in English Channel  AP NewsUK and France strike new £662m small boats deal  BBCUK to pay for French officers to deport asylum see
items.desc_zh: 英国和法国政府签署一项为期三年的协议，遏制英吉利海峡的移民过境 美联社新闻英国和法国达成新的价值 6.62 亿英镑的小船协议 BBCUK 为法国官员驱逐庇护者提供费用

items.title_en: Trump tells BBC that King's visit could 'absolutely' help repair relations with UK
items.title_zh: 特朗普告诉BBC，金的访问“绝对”有助于修复与英国的关系
items.desc_en: In a phone interview with the BBC's North America editor, the president discussed next week's visit and his relationship with the UK PM.
items.desc_zh: 在接受英国广播公司北美编辑的电话采访时，总统讨论了下周的访问以及他与英国首相的关系。

items.title_en: Microsoft plans first voluntary employee buyout in company's 51-year history
items.title_zh: 微软计划进行公司 51 年历史上的首次员工自愿买断
items.desc_en: Microsoft's inaugural voluntary buyouts will be open to workers at the senior director level and below whose years of employment and age add up to 70 or more.
items.desc_zh: 微软首次自愿买断将向高级主管级别及以下级别的员工开放，他们的工作年限和年龄合计达到 70 岁或以上。

items.title_en: South Africa's president suspends police chief after court charges
items.title_zh: 南非总统在法庭指控后暂停警察局长职务
items.desc_en: Cyril Ramaphosa said the suspension was because of the critical role Fannie Masemola plays in fighting crime.
items.desc_zh: 西里尔·拉马福萨表示，此次停职是因为房利美·马塞莫拉在打击犯罪方面发挥了关键作用。

items.title_en: US-Kuwaiti journalist held in Kuwait over social media posts acquitted, lawyers say
items.title_zh: 律师称，因社交媒体帖子而在科威特被关押的美国科威特记者被无罪释放
items.desc_en: Ahmed Shihab-Eldin reportedly faced charges, including spreading false information, after he re-posted images related to the Iran war.
items.desc_zh: 据报道，艾哈迈德·谢哈布-埃尔丁在转发与伊朗战争有关的图片后面临包括散布虚假信息在内的指控。

items.title_en: Iran takes seized ships to port, countries check on seafarers' safety - Reuters
items.title_zh: 伊朗将被扣押的船只运回港口，各国检查海员的安全 - 路透中文网
items.desc_en: Iran takes seized ships to port, countries check on seafarers' safety  ReutersIran escalates Hormuz 'tit-for-tat,' seizes ship tied to billionaire close to Trump, Macron  Fox NewsIran shows off its co
items.desc_zh: 伊朗将被扣押的船只运往港口，各国检查海员的安全路透社伊朗“针锋相对”地升级了霍尔木兹海峡，扣押了与特朗普关系密切的亿万富翁有关的船只，马克龙福克斯新闻伊朗展示了其合作伙伴关系

items.title_en: More than 500 people killed in Tanzania election violence, inquiry finds
items.title_zh: 调查发现坦桑尼亚选举暴力事件造成500多人死亡
items.desc_en: Opposition parties accused security forces but the official report does not say who was responsible.
items.desc_zh: 反对党指责安全部队，但官方报告没有说明谁应对此负责。

items.title_en: How the Iran war is hitting U.S. homebuilders
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争如何打击美国房屋建筑商
items.desc_en: A slew of building suppliers reported price hikes in April on everything from foam insulation and roofing to windows and doors.
items.desc_zh: 许多建筑供应商报告称，从泡沫隔热材料、屋顶到门窗，四月份所有产品的价格都上涨了。

items.title_en: UK Biobank health data listed for sale in China, government confirms
items.title_zh: 政府确认英国生物银行健康数据在中国出售
items.desc_en: The government said medical data of 500,000 people was affected but no personally identifiable information had been made available.
items.desc_zh: 政府表示，50 万人的医疗数据受到影响，但尚未提供任何个人身份信息。

items.title_en: These charts show how Iran's economy is in freefall
items.title_zh: 这些图表显示伊朗经济如何自由落体
items.desc_en: Tehran's hardline rhetoric belies a brutal reality facing the regime and Iranian citizens: its economy, vulnerable even before the war, is now in tatters.
items.desc_zh: 德黑兰的强硬言论掩盖了该政权和伊朗公民面临的残酷现实：其经济在战前就已经脆弱不堪，而现在却已支离破碎。

items.title_en: How the Iran war has stoked competition between India and China for Russian oil
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争如何加剧印度和中国对俄罗斯石油的竞争
items.desc_en: As the Iran war drags on and the Strait of Hormuz stays shut, India and China are increasingly competing against each other for shrinking crude oil supplies.
items.desc_zh: 随着伊朗战争的拖延和霍尔木兹海峡的关闭，印度和中国日益激烈地争夺日益萎缩的原油供应。

items.title_en: Two trains collide head-on in Denmark, leaving four critically hurt
items.title_zh: 丹麦两列火车迎面相撞，四人重伤
items.desc_en: The accident happened early on Thursday at a level crossing north of Copenhagen.
items.desc_zh: 这起事故于周四早些时候发生在哥本哈根北部的一个平交道口。

items.title_en: US Navy chief leaving post 'effective immediately', Pentagon says
items.title_zh: 五角大楼表示，美国海军司令离职“立即生效”
items.desc_en: US Navy Secretary John Phelan is the latest high-ranking military leader to leave the administration in recent months.
items.desc_zh: 美国海军部长约翰·费兰是近几个月来最新一位离开政府的高级军事领导人。

items.desc_en: New Call of Duty games will be added to the subscription service "about a year" after release, Microsoft said.
items.desc_zh: 微软表示，新的《使命召唤》游戏将在发布“大约一年”后添加到订阅服务中。

items.title_en: UK gaming icon Peter Molyneux on AI, his final creation and a changing industry
items.title_zh: 英国游戏偶像 Peter Molyneux 谈人工智能、他的最终创作和不断变化的行业
items.desc_en: The creator of iconic series such as Fable says Masters of Albion will be the last game he makes.
items.desc_zh: 《神鬼寓言》等标志性系列游戏的创作者表示，《阿尔比恩大师》将是他制作的最后一款游戏。

items.title_en: Meta to track workers' clicks and keystrokes to train AI
items.title_zh: Meta 跟踪工人的点击和击键以训练人工智能
items.desc_en: The firm will take data from the way employees work for its artificial intelligence models.
items.desc_zh: 该公司将从员工的工作方式中获取数据用于其人工智能模型。

items.title_en: AI hacking tools like Mythos can be 'net positive' says top cyber official
items.title_zh: 高级网络官员表示，像 Mythos 这样的人工智能黑客工具可能具有“净积极性”
items.desc_en: The head of the National Cyber Security Centre says frontier AI tools can be a force for good - if kept out of the wrong hands.
items.desc_zh: 国家网络安全中心负责人表示，前沿人工智能工具如果不落入坏人之手，可以成为一股正义的力量。

items.title_en: Ofcom investigating Telegram over child sexual abuse material concerns
items.title_zh: Ofcom 就儿童性虐待材料问题对 Telegram 进行调查
items.desc_en: The popular messaging service told the BBC in a statement it "categorically denies Ofcom's accusations".
items.desc_zh: 这家受欢迎的消息服务公司在一份声明中告诉英国广播公司，它“断然否认 Ofcom 的指控”。

items.title_en: How will Apple change under 'product guy' John Ternus?
items.title_zh: 在“产品人”约翰·特努斯 (John Ternus) 的领导下，苹果将如何改变？
items.desc_en: As Tim Cook announces his departure from the top job at Apple, these are the key challenges for new boss John Ternus.
items.desc_zh: 随着蒂姆·库克 (Tim Cook) 宣布辞去苹果公司最高职位，这些都是新任老板约翰·特努斯 (John Ternus) 面临的主要挑战。

items.desc_zh: 随着库克出任执行董事长，约翰·特努斯 (John Ternus) 将接管这家科技巨头的运营。
